title: Session 0: Beads System Bootstrap
body: Initial setup of Coach Task Tracker beads work-tracking system

title: Built full frontend (Phases 1-6 UI) + fixed coaches CRUD backend
body: Built entire React frontend using ui-ux-pro-max-skill design system. Teal/orange palette, Plus Jakarta Sans + Inter, Tailwind v4 @theme tokens. All pages: Login, Admin Dashboard/Coaches/TaskBoard/AssignTask, Coach Dashboard/MyTasks. All components: Layout/Sidebar/Header/NotificationBell/TaskCard/Modals/SlideOver/UI kit. Fixed server/routes/coaches.js (was 501 stub, now full CRUD). Added name column migration to db.js. Build passes. Tasks+notifications routes still stubs — next agent priority.

title: Phase 3: Implement tasks routes (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE, complete, delay-reason)
body: Backend tasks.js routes are stubs. Need: GET /api/tasks (admin + filters), GET /api/tasks/mine (coach), POST /api/tasks (assign + notification), PUT /api/tasks/:id (update), DELETE /api/tasks/:id, PUT /api/tasks/:id/complete (coach only), PUT /api/tasks/:id/delay-reason (coach only). Frontend pages already built and waiting.

title: Phase 3: Task Management Backend - COMPLETE
body: Implemented all 8 task endpoints (GET /tasks, /tasks/mine, /:id, POST, PUT, DELETE, /complete, /delay-reason). All routes working with proper auth guards (requireAdmin, requireCoach) and ownership checks. createNotification helper created and integrated. 23 integration tests passing. Ready for Phase 5 notifications.

title: Phase 5: Notifications System - COMPLETE
body: Implemented 3 notification API endpoints (GET /notifications, PUT /:id/read, PUT /read-all) + 2 idempotent hourly cron jobs (midpoint nudge, overdue detection). All endpoints with proper auth and ownership checks. Cron jobs scheduled on startup and logging. 8 integration tests passing. All 31 Phase 3+5 tests passing. Database and cron.js working correctly.
